title: Crash in vpi_handle_by_name
body:
I tried to verify a design containing an enum with [cocotb](https://github.com/potentialventures/cocotb). But as soon as there is an enum in the top level module and the testbench tries to access a signal in the top level module, vvp will crash.

I have created a minimal (non-)working example consisting of these three files that triggers the bug:
File 1 (`enum.sv`):
```
`default_nettype none
`timescale 1ns/1ns

	typedef enum reg[3:0]
	{
		INVALID  = 4'b0000,
		ONE      = 4'b0001,
		TWO      = 4'b0011,
		THREE    = 4'b0111,
		FOUR     = 4'b1111
	} thermometer;

module example(input wire clk);

	//   |  Uncomment either this...
	//   v
	//typedef enum reg
	//{
	//	FOO = 1'b0,
	//	BAR = 1'b1
	//} something_else;

	//   |  ... or that and the
	//   v   simulator segfaults.
	thermometer foo;

	always @(posedge clk)
	begin
		$display("Got a rising clock edge");
	end

endmodule
```

File 2 (`test_enum.py`):
```
import cocotb
from cocotb.triggers import Timer

@cocotb.test()
def test_enum(dut):
	"""
	Try enum variables
	"""
	dut._log.info("Running test!")
	for cycle in range(10):
		dut._log.info("X")
		dut.clk = 0
		dut._log.info("Y")
		yield Timer(1000)
		dut.clk = 1
		yield Timer(1000)
	dut._log.info("Running test!")
```

File 3 (`Makefile`):
```
export USER_DIR:=$(shell pwd)

include $(COCOTB)/makefiles/Makefile.inc
include $(COCOTB)/makefiles/Makefile.sim

VERILOG_SOURCES = enum.sv
TOPLEVEL = example
MODULE=test_enum
```

When running `make` -> `make debug` -> `run` -> `backtrace` in the directory containing these three files,  gdb yields the following output and backtrace:
```
> make debug
PYTHONPATH=/home/mox/projects/tests/tests_0/build/libs/x86_64:/usr/local/cocotb-1.1.0:/home/mox/projects/tests/tests_0: LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/mox/projects/tests/tests_0/build/libs/x86_64::/usr/lib:/usr/lib MODULE=test_enum \
        TESTCASE= TOPLEVEL=example TOPLEVEL_LANG= \
        gdb --args /usr/bin/vvp -M /home/mox/projects/tests/tests_0/build/libs/x86_64 -m gpivpi sim_build/sim.vvp

#32 0x00007ffff77cbfc9 in VpiStartupCbHdl::run_callback (this=0x5555558c98d0) at VpiCbHdl.cpp:467
#33 0x00007ffff77c7e17 in handle_vpi_callback (cb_data=0x5555559478f0) at VpiImpl.cpp:551

#36 0x00005555555bc58d in main ()
(gdb)
```

When I raised the issue in the [cocotb bug tracker](https://github.com/potentialventures/cocotb/issues/856), they noted this is probably a bug in iverilog and asked me report it. I am not sure if such a thing belongs here or in the [sourceforge bug tracker](https://sourceforge.net/p/iverilog/bugs/?page=0). Please tell me, if I should have posted there, or if you need more info.
